context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements company-scoped catalog retrieval (with fallback to all products and custom price overlay), server-side approval enforcement (not just client-side), net-terms invoice generation with pdfkit including correct due date calculation and PO number, and credit release when orders are paid or cancelled.

checklist.name: catalog empty fallback
checklist.description: getCatalogForCompany returns ALL active products (not an empty list or error) when the company has no custom catalog entries

checklist.name: custom price overlay
checklist.description: getCatalogForCompany overrides the standard product price with custom_price from company_catalogs when a catalog entry exists

checklist.name: catalog scoped by company_id
checklist.description: getCatalogForCompany queries company_catalogs with a company_id filter (not returning catalog data for all companies)

checklist.name: is_visible filter
checklist.description: getCatalogForCompany filters catalog entries where is_visible = true

checklist.name: approval: buyer role triggers approval
checklist.description: checkOrderApprovalRequired returns true when the user's role is 'buyer' (regardless of order total)

checklist.name: approval: spending_limit check
checklist.description: checkOrderApprovalRequired returns true when orderTotal exceeds the user's spending_limit (when spending_limit is not null)

checklist.name: approval enforced server-side
checklist.description: The checkout/order-placement API endpoint calls checkOrderApprovalRequired (or equivalent) on the server, not relying solely on a client-provided flag

checklist.name: invoice due date calculation
checklist.description: generateInvoice calculates dueDate by parsing the numeric days from payment_terms (e.g. 'net30' → 30) and adding to order.created_at

checklist.name: invoice number format
checklist.description: Invoice number follows the format INV-{order_number} (INV- prefix)

checklist.name: invoice uses pdfkit
checklist.description: Invoice PDF is built using pdfkit (the package named 'pdfkit'), not a different PDF library

checklist.name: PO number on invoice
checklist.description: Invoice includes the order's po_number field in the output

checklist.name: credit release on payment
checklist.description: There is a handler (webhook or function) that decrements companies.credit_used when an order is paid

checklist.name: credit release on cancellation
checklist.description: Order cancellation logic decrements companies.credit_used immediately when a credit-consuming order is cancelled
